description: Take the lead in a throwback design with the nike Izanami women's shoe, an updated take on a classic running shoe with a sleek, low-profile silhouette.Upper Leather upper with glossy nike swoosh on the side Stitch detailing to further add to the structure Lace-ups for snug Fit Minimal lining on the collar and tongue for lightweight Brand tab on the tongue and collar tab Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with herringbone pattern on the forefoot outsole for durability and traction Shoe careBrush off dirt with a leather brushUse a branded leather shoe polish to retain the sheen
